allergyNotes: Household dairy and egg allergy. Recipes must not include dairy or egg ingredients. Never use a sale item that commonly contains dairy/egg (mayo, creamy dressings, most baked desserts) without a 'check the label' warning. Standard dry pasta is fine; fresh/egg pasta is not.

publix.note: geolocated default store; BOGOs are consistent chain-wide

kroger.note: geolocated default store; deals vary by division
